children.heading: Management
children.label: c Management
children.text: Where management requirements for a stream segment described in the amendments made by this section differ between the Wild and Scenic Rivers Act ( et seq.) and the Wilderness Area, the more restrictive requirements shall apply.16 U.S.C. 1271
